questions.original_question: Please confirm unlimited AI token usage is included in the standard annual subscription.
questions.generated_answer: No. Unlimited AI token usage is not included in the standard annual subscription. The standard commercial position is that AI usage is handled separately via agreed volume bands, while the subscription covers the annual fee and implementation is scoped separately.

risk.reason: The references directly and explicitly support the statement that unlimited AI usage is not included and that AI usage is managed via volume bands, so the risk of inaccuracy against the provided sources is low.
